meta.title: Scluba — The branded digital scorecard for your golf club
meta.description: Your golfers play. Your club shines. Scluba turns every round into social visibility for your golf course — no app to install.

launch.text: First month free for the first 10 clubs

hero.tagline: The branded digital scorecard for your club.
hero.subtagline: Your golfers play. Your club shines.

lines: Today, your golfers walk off the course.
And snap a picture of their paper scorecard.
Without any mention of your club.
problem.punchline: Every round is a missed visibility opportunity.

steps.title: Scluba in 3 gestures
steps.lead: A simple mechanic, designed for the club and the player. Zero installation, zero complexity for your team.

items.title: QR at the desk
items.body: We send you an elegant frame to place on your reception counter.

items.title: The player scans
items.body: Instant web app, no install. GPS, score, distance, duration — in real time.

items.title: Card shared
items.body: Recap card in your club's colors, shared on the player's social networks.

phone.phase1Title: During the round, the app keeps pace.
phone.phase1Lead: GPS tracking, hole-by-hole scoring, distance, duration. The player never reaches for a notepad.
phone.phase2Title: When it's over, the card is ready.
phone.phase2Lead: Branded in your colors, photographic, shareable in one tap. Available from the Essential plan.
phone.footer: Shared from Scluba · Golf du Soleil · #GolfDuSoleil

showcase.title: One card per club identity.
showcase.lead: Coastal, forest, classic, clay: the card adopts the visual codes of your golf course. No generic templates. No third-party branding.

how.title: From signature to first card shared: 7 days.

items.title: 5 min on the phone
items.body: Give us your website URL. We extract logo, colors and photos to build a mockup.

items.title: Mockup in 24h
items.body: You receive the branded page to validate. Unlimited tweaks until your OK.

items.title: QR frame delivered
items.body: We ship you an elegant QR frame, ready to place on your reception desk.

items.title: Monthly reporting
items.body: Every month, an email recap: scans, rounds played, social shares.

pricing.title: Two plans, one promise.
pricing.lead: $49 gives you the branded recap card. $79 adds the real-time tracking app. No commitment, cancel any month. −20% on 3 years.

plans.name: Essential
features: Photographic recap card in your colors
Your club's logo and identity built in
Elegant QR frame provided for the desk

plans.name: Complete
plans.tagline: Everything in Essential + the tracking app
features: Web app + iOS and Android apps

items.q: Does the player need to install an app?
items.a: No by default: a QR scan opens the web app in the browser, no install. For regulars, free iOS and Android apps are available on the App Store and Play Store.

items.q: Do you need our logo and brand guidelines?
items.a: No. We start from your website and automatically extract logo, colors and photos. Mockup delivered within 24h, refined until your validation.

items.q: How do we track Scluba usage at the club?
items.a: Every month you receive a clear email reporting: number of scans, rounds played, social shares. No interface to learn, no tools to install on the club side.
None by default, cancel any month. If you want to lock in a rate, the 3-year commitment gives −20% off ($39 or $63 /month).

items.q: Do you need any specific equipment at the club?
items.a: No. The provided QR frame is the only thing to set up. It works without power, without club wifi, without your team's intervention.

items.q: Is this an official handicap tracking tool?
items.a: No. Scluba is a leisure round and social-sharing tool. It complements your official tools without replacing them.

cta.title: See what your card would look like before any decision.
cta.lead: Give us your golf course URL, we generate the mockup in 24h. No credit card required.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks, we'll get back to you within 24h.
form.error: Oops, something went wrong. Try again or email us directly.

footer.tagline: The branded digital scorecard for golf clubs.
